# HealthspanWire
> Daily longevity science and healthspan research intelligence

HealthspanWire is an independent publication tracking the frontiers of longevity
science. We cover aging biology, longevity therapeutics, biomarkers, nutrition
science, gene therapy, and the technologies extending human healthspan.

## Key Resources
- Signal Tracker: /signals/ — 10 tracked research signals with evidence
- Monthly Reports: /monthly-reports/ — editorial synthesis of monthly trends
- Daily Coverage: / — curated news with professional analysis
- Newsletter: /newsletter/ — weekly digest and signal alerts

## Topics Covered
Senolytic therapies, rapamycin, epigenetic clocks, biological age biomarkers,
caloric restriction mimetics, NAD+ precursors, gut microbiome aging, AI drug
discovery, gene therapy, CRISPR, longevity regulatory frameworks, funding trends.

## Audience
Longevity researchers, biotech professionals, aging biology scientists,
healthspan clinicians, biotech investors, and longevity industry analysts.
